body: Closes #3228 [summary_2D.pdf](https://github.com/user-attachments/files/16640943/summary_2D.pdf) [summary.pdf](https://github.com/user-attachments/files/16640944/summary.pdf) `edt` instantaneous at upper levels shows ~ 0 diffusivity.
title: Add minimum exchange coeff + exponentially decaying diffusion to Frierson functions
